chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3438 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on MA No.14840/2022. For orders on office objection. For orders on MA No.14371/2022. For hearing of main case. 14-12-2022 Mr. Ali Mohsin advocate for petitioners. There appears to be enmity between petitioners and private respondents. This petition has been filed by the petitioners for seeking direction to the police officials for producing criminal record of the respondents and direction the police officials to act in accordance with law besides seeking legal protection. For the same relief the petitioners can file an application before the relevant Justice of Peace. The direct approach to this Court for such purpose is not maintainable and this petition is accordingly dismissed in limine along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
